    C

    collectNumFromGuesser() - Method in class Umpire
    Collects the secret number from the guesser.
    collectNumFromPlayers() - Method in class Umpire
    Collects predicted numbers from all three players.
    compare() - Method in class Umpire
    Compares the guesser's number with each player's prediction and announces the winner.

    G

    gnum - Variable in class Guesser
    The secret number chosen by the guesser
    Guesser - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class represents the Guesser who picks a secret number.
    Guesser() - Constructor for class Guesser
     
    GuesserGame - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main class for the Number Guessing Game.
    GuesserGame() - Constructor for class GuesserGame
     
    guessingNum(Scanner) - Method in class Guesser
    Asks the guesser to enter a number.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class GuesserGame
    Entry point - starts the game.

    N

    number(Scanner) - Method in class Player
    Asks the player to enter their predicted number.
    numFromGuesser - Variable in class Umpire
     
    numFromPlayer1 - Variable in class Umpire
     
    numFromPlayer2 - Variable in class Umpire
     
    numFromPlayer3 - Variable in class Umpire
     

    P

    Player - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class represents a Player who tries to predict the guesser's number.
    Player() - Constructor for class Player
     
    pnum - Variable in class Player
    The number predicted by the player

    S

    scn - Variable in class Umpire
     

    U

    Umpire - Class in Unnamed Package
    The Umpire manages the whole game.

    Constructor that takes a Scanner for input.
